content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(7, 9, 2), (0, 1, 3), (0, 6, 5), (0, 8, 8), (1, 7, 8), (0, 5, 9), (5, 6, 9), (2, 8, 10), (3, 4, 12), (1, 9, 13), (4, 9, 13), (5, 9, 15), (1, 8, 16), (0, 3, 17), (2, 3, 17), (1, 5, 19), (2, 7, 19)]

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 19.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (7, 9, 2) has node 7 and time 2. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 1, 3) has node 0 and time 3. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (0, 6, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 8, 8) has node 0 and time 8. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 7, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 5, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 6, 9) has node 5 and time 9. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 8, 10) has node 2 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 4, 12) has node 3 and time 12. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 9, 13) has node 1 and time 13. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 9, 13) has node 4 and time 13. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 9, 15) has node 5 and time 15. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 8, 16) has node 1 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 3, 17) has node 0 and time 17. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 3, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 5, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 7, 19) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 7.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 5 at time 19.

Answer: [9, 6, 8, 7, 5]
